reason: updater + process plugins each need their capability permission added to the main window; follow least-privilege capability rules.
Register the updater/process plugins in lib.rs per the plugin conventions; keep lib.rs thin.
useUpdateCheck is a new hook under the coverage gate; test it with a mocked @tauri-apps/plugin-updater per the harness conventions.
Updater hook + prompt must be strictly typed (no any); narrow the plugin's check() result and handle errors.
The in-app update prompt + Settings button follow component conventions.
